THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOKE, MARITA KING, CHARITI M. KOGA, KEVIN AKA NOBLE KOGA FRASER, TERRY CASTENEDA, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 331 10TH STREET $2,366.12 RENT, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $390.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,276.12, STAYED UNTIL APR-09-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. MONEY JDMT AS TO JOHN CASTANEDA, MARITA COOKE & CHARITI M KING ONLY. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
